final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand guideline showcase for RAN QIU (染秋), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: clean flat design, editorial brand guideline layout, Swiss modernism meets Eastern minimalism
Subject: primary color swatch, secondary color palette, and typography specimen for "染秋" brand identity
Composition: top-down grid layout, three distinct sections (color / type / application), generous white space, 4:3 aspect ratio
Color palette: warm autumn terracotta as primary, muted amber and dried maple leaf ochre as secondary, soft cream paper background
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must display CMYK/RGB values for each color; typography must show both Chinese characters and Latin alphabet in brand typeface; scalable for print and digital
Avoid: gradient overload; generic sans-serif without character; neon colors; cluttered layout; stock photo backgrounds; western-centric autumn clichés like pumpkins
